short_blurb: Experienced roofing contractor serving Rowland Heights homes and businesses.
local_note: Rowland Heights is an unincorporated community in LA County with a mix of single-family neighborhoods and commercial corridors. The area has a strong homeowner community and high standards for contractor quality. We're fully licensed, bonded, and insured — and we back every project with a written workmanship warranty. We don't subcontract our labor; every crew is employed by us directly.

faqs.q: Do you use subcontractors in Rowland Heights?
faqs.a: No. Every crew that works on your roof is a direct employee of Palm Crest Roofing, covered under our workers' comp policy. We never broker jobs to unlicensed subcontractors.
